Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Litigation Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANDREW ALEXANDER DOSA, Esq. of Law Offices of Andrew Dosa (Tel: 510-865-1600) for plaintiff;
Atty. THOMAS G. TROST, Esq. of Sproul Trost LLP (Tel: 916-783-6262) for defendant/cross-complainant/cross-defendant Walker Telecomm Inc.
Atty. DAVID A. BELCHER, Esq. of Faegre Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP (Tel: 310-203-4000) for cross-defendant Johnson Constrols Fire Protection L.P.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT JOHNSON CONTROLS FIRE PROTECTION L.P.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Litigation Pending Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendant Johnson Controls Fire Protection L.P.'s motion to compel arbitration and to stay case number CGC-22-599515 pending arbitration. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Litigation Pending Arbitration

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the court's law and motion department (room 302) at 9:30 a.m. on January 25, 2023.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
